type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment:
Normal variability associated with catalyst change out frequency requirements and gasifier operations.
Changes to estimation method (previously included Molybdenum Sulphide in this quantity).  Initiated catalyst recycling program in 2021, diverting from landfill disposal.
First year reporting this substance from wastewater.
